segments.caption: The video opens with a man wearing a black polo shirt and a gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone in a studio setting with blue lighting and shelves displaying tech gadgets in the background. He speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands as he introduces the topic. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs interface, where he demonstrates searching for 'gpt finder' and displays multiple results. He then shows a Google Sheets document titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with icons, categories, descriptions, and links. The video cuts back to the man, who continues explaining with expressive hand movements. The screen recording returns, showing the 'GPT Finder' configuration page with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a preview section with sample prompts. Throughout, the man’s face appears in a small circular overlay during screen recordings, maintaining visual continuity. The environment remains consistent with professional studio lighting and a tech-focused backdrop.

discovered_new_entities.Man in Studio: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings.
discovered_new_entities.ChatGPT GPTs Interface: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories like 'Top Picks' and 'Featured', and a list of GPTs with icons and descriptions.
discovered_new_entities.Google Sheets Document: A spreadsheet titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing GPTs with columns for GPT Name, Icon, Category, Description, and Link, displayed in a browser window.
discovered_new_entities.GPT Finder Configuration Page: A ChatGPT interface showing the 'GPT Finder' setup with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge', a 'Preview' section with sample prompts, and a 'Capabilities' section listing Web Browsing and DALL·E Image Generation.

segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the GPT Finder Configuration Page, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-right corner, speaking directly to the camera. The interface displays uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a 'Preview' section with sample prompts. The scene transitions to a title card reading 'DOC MAKER' with a stylized '10' logo. The video then cuts to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio continues his narration as the user types 'doc maker' into the search bar. The search results show 'Doc Maker' by aidocmaker.com as the top result, highlighted with 25K+ interactions. The user selects it, and the interface loads the Doc Maker GPT, which introduces itself with a detailed breakdown of its capabilities: Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, and Data Analysis. The user then requests a presentation on 'Generative AI,' and the GPT generates a slide deck, which is previewed in a new browser tab. The presentation includes slides titled 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?' with clean, modern design elements. The Man in Studio gestures expressively throughout, emphasizing key points about the GPT's functionality.

segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of a presentation titled 'Applications of Generative AI' in a browser, with the Man in Studio visible in a circular overlay in the top-right corner. He interacts with the interface, clicking through options like 'Preview', 'Listen', and 'Download', before navigating to a new tab. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting with shelves and framed displays in the background. The video then cuts to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the user searches for and selects 'Super Describe', a GPT for generating image prompts. The user uploads a black-and-white architectural photo of an escalator, and the GPT generates a detailed textual description of the image, which is displayed alongside the original. The user then searches for 'Prompt Perfect', another GPT, and views its description, which explains how it enhances user prompts for AI image generation. Throughout, the Man in Studio remains in the circular overlay, guiding the viewer through the process with expressive hand gestures and direct address.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera in a well-lit studio environment, gesturing with his right hand as he explains a concept. The background features shelves with tech equipment and framed blue displays, creating a professional atmosphere. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-left corner, continuing his narration. He demonstrates the 'Prompt Perfect' GPT, showing its interface and explaining its function to enhance user prompts for AI tools like DALL·E. The screen then shifts to a search for 'logo creator' within the GPTs Interface, revealing a list of logo-related GPTs. The user selects 'Logo Creator' and initiates a conversation, where the GPT asks for design preferences (Vibrant, Neutral, Serious). The user selects 'B) Neutral', and the GPT generates a grid of nine logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' using a blue and gray color palette. The final screen displays the generated logos with a prompt asking for feedback, while the Man in Studio continues to narrate the process.

segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Logo Creator GPT is displayed, showing nine distinct logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' in a blue and grey color palette, accompanied by a message asking for user feedback. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio, who is speaking directly to the camera in a dimly lit studio with blue ambient lighting, shelves of tech gadgets, and a microphone in front of him. He gestures expressively as he speaks. The video then cuts back to the screen recording, where the user interacts with the Logo Creator GPT, hovering over one of the logos. Next, the interface shifts to the main ChatGPT GPTs page, where the user selects the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT from the 'Top Picks' list. The interface loads the Creative Writing Coach, which presents a prompt for feedback on a writing passage. The user types a detailed sci-fi story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2050' into the input field, describing a futuristic world with advanced technology and environmental collapse, and a character named Maya who discovers a time-traveling device. The story includes a character named Leo, a clockmaker from the 20th century, and ends with a prompt for feedback. The screen remains on the input field as the user awaits a response.

segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where a user is interacting with the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT, receiving feedback on a science fiction story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2090'. The interface displays a detailed analysis of the story's strengths, including its intriguing premise, world-building, character development, and thematic depth. The user then navigates to the 'Explore GPTs' section and searches for 'convert anything', selecting the 'Convert Anything' GPT by Pietro Schirano. The scene transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio, who speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with his hands as he explains the functionality of the 'Convert Anything' GPT. The video cuts back to the screen recording, showing the 'Convert Anything' interface with options to convert files like PDF to JPG or images to PNG. The user uploads a PNG file of an escalator image, and the GPT processes it, generating a download link for the converted JPEG file. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing his explanation, emphasizing the utility of the GPT for file conversion tasks. The video concludes with the screen recording showing the successful conversion and the download link being displayed.

segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the 'Convert Anything' GPT is actively processing a file conversion request, displaying Python code for converting a PNG to JPEG and showing a 'Downloading...' status. The interface then transitions to the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, which presents examples of various diagram types including Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams. The screen recording returns, scrolling through the diagram examples, showcasing Mermaid and PlantUML mindmaps, Graphviz and ErD entity relationship diagrams, and highlighting the visual differences between them. segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, showcasing a list of 'Top Picks' including GPTs like Consensus, AI PDF, and ScholarAI. segments.caption: The video begins with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the user searches for 'Invideo AI' and selects the 'Video AI by Invideo' GPT. The interface displays a dark theme with a central prompt area and a sidebar listing other GPTs like 'Skill Leap AI' and 'Code Crafter'. The user types a request to create a YouTube video explaining generative AI to high school students. The GPT responds with a 'Starting action' message, then requests permission to access the user's account, which is granted. The system generates a video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students', providing a clickable link. The user clicks the link, transitioning to the Invideo AI platform, which features a dark interface with a 'Join with Google' or 'Continue with email' option. The user proceeds, and the video generation process begins, showing a progress bar and a workspace selection screen. The video is then displayed in the Invideo AI editor, with a preview of abstract AI-themed visuals and a timeline at the bottom. The interface includes options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate', and the video is shown playing with a 'Storyblocks' watermark. segments.caption: The video begins with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera in a studio setting with shelves and framed displays in the background. He gestures expressively as he introduces the topic. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the 'Screenshot to Code GPT' is being demonstrated. The interface shows a dark theme with a prompt to upload a screenshot, and the user uploads an image of a Shopify pricing page. The GPT processes the image and generates clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is displayed in the chat window. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing his explanation with hand gestures, emphasizing the capabilities of the GPT. The video then cuts to a close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code, and logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appear in the corner, suggesting the versatility of the generated code. The scene returns to the ChatGPT interface, showing the generated code for the Shopify page, including HTML structure, Tailwind classes, and a script tag. The Man in Studio appears again, reinforcing the utility of the tool. The video then shows a live preview of the generated code rendered on a webpage, displaying the Shopify pricing cards with accurate styling and layout. The final frames return to the ChatGPT interface, highlighting the seamless conversion from screenshot to functional code, with the Man in Studio providing concluding remarks.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera, seated in front of a microphone, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, gesturing expressively as he introduces the content. The scene transitions to a screen recording of a SkillLeap AI course interface, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-left corner, continuing his narration. The interface displays a grid of course thumbnails, including titles like 'COMPLETE CUSTOM GPT COURSE', 'MASTERING DALL·E 3', and 'CHATGPT PROMPTS INTRO COURSE', each with a yellow banner and the instructor's image. The view then zooms into a detailed course outline for 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs', showing sections such as 'SECTION 1.1 INTRODUCTION TO GPTS', 'SECTION 1.2 BUILDING YOUR FIRST GPT', and 'SECTION 2.4 10 GPT ACTIONS WITH ZAPIER', with sub-sections listed beneath. The cursor scrolls through the outline, highlighting various sections, including 'SECTION 3.1 ADDING GPT WITH BOTPRESS P1', 'SECTION 4.1 GPT STORE INTRODUCTION', and 'SECTION 5.1 GPT COURSE WRAP UP'. The Man in Studio reappears in the live shot, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks, before the screen returns to the course interface, now showing the top of the page with the course title 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs' and a description emphasizing personalized AI for business. The video then cycles back to the grid of course thumbnails, with the Man in Studio’s overlay still present, and ends with a text overlay stating 'Link In Description' appearing at the bottom of the screen, indicating where viewers can find more information.

segments.caption: The video opens with a medium close-up of the Man in Studio, seated in a dimly lit, modern studio environment with a blue-toned backdrop. His facial expressions are engaged and animated, suggesting he is introducing or explaining a topic with enthusiasm. The lighting is focused on him, creating a professional and polished atmosphere, typical of a tech or educational vlog. entity_library.Diagrams: Show Me: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a diagram symbol, designed to generate and display various types of diagrams. It showcases examples of Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear visual representations and labels for each type.
entity_library.Invideo AI Platform: A dark-themed video creation platform with a central 'Idea to Video' section, featuring an astronaut graphic and options to 'Join with Google', 'Join with Apple', or 'Continue with email'. The platform displays a video generation progress bar, a workspace selection screen, and a video editor with a timeline, playback controls, and options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate'. The video preview shows abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark.
entity_library.Screenshot to Code GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a stylized 'S' and 'C', designed to convert website screenshots into clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code. It is shown processing a Shopify pricing page screenshot and outputting the corresponding code in the chat window.
entity_library.Laptop Typing Scene: A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code. The desk includes a coffee cup, a mouse, and a smartphone, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing in the corner, indicating the tool's compatibility with various platforms.
entity_library.SkillLeap AI Course Interface: A dark-themed web interface for an online course titled 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs', featuring a grid of course thumbnails with yellow banners, section outlines with numbered sub-sections, and a course description at the top. The interface includes navigation elements like 'Continue watching', 'Add to Favorites', and 'Share'.
